I found a document called "vacation-plans.docx" that contains information about your Hawaii vacation, including a basic packing list. I'll use this to create a more comprehensive packing list for your trip.

args.content:
# Hawaii Vacation Packing List

## Clothing
- Swimwear (2-3 sets)
- Beach cover-ups
- Flip-flops/sandals
- Casual t-shirts and shorts
- Light sweater or jacket (for cooler evenings)
- Dressy outfit (for nice dinners)
- Underwear and socks
- Sleepwear
- Hat/cap for sun protection
- Sunglasses

## Beach & Water Activities
- Reef-safe sunscreen (SPF 30 or higher)
- After-sun lotion (aloe vera)
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins)
- Beach towel
- Waterproof phone case
- Dry bag for electronics
- Water shoes (for rocky beaches)

## Hiking & Outdoor Gear
- Hiking shoes/boots
- Daypack/backpack
- Water bottle/hydration pack
- Insect repellent
- First aid kit
- Flashlight/headlamp

## Electronics
- Smartphone and charger
- Camera and charger
- Power bank
- Travel adapter (if needed)
- Headphones

## Toiletries
- Toothbrush and toothpaste
- Shampoo and conditioner
- Body wash
- Deodorant
- Razor and shaving supplies
- Makeup and makeup remover
- Hairbrush/comb
- Hair styling tools
- Feminine hygiene products
- Prescription medications
- Motion sickness medication (if needed)

## Documents & Money
- Passport/ID
- Airline tickets/boarding passes
- Hotel reservation details
- Travel insurance information
- Credit cards
- Cash (some US dollars)
- Emergency contact information

## Special Items for Planned Activities
- For Hanauma Bay snorkeling: underwater camera
- For Diamond Head hike: lightweight backpack
- For Luau: aloha shirt or floral dress (if desired)
- For spa day: swimsuit
- For shopping: reusable shopping bag

## Miscellaneous
- Books or e-reader
- Travel journal
- Snacks for travel days
- Reusable water bottle
- Laundry bag
- Small padlock (for hotel safe)

Have a wonderful vacation in Hawaii!
